category_title: Students who withdraw or read unsanctioned texts to resist remedial instruction
minimal_context: The student is participating in an independent reading period using the program's prescribed library of books.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for independent reading. Please find your book from the class library and get started.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Spends a long time searching through the books without picking one) I'm still looking.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Hurry up and find your book.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: They are like tiny kid books that they make us read. Skinny little books about that big.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just pick one and get started reading.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Refuses to read) I'm not reading these. Dang, this class makes me feel stupid. It makes me a little mad n stupid to b in this class right now!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for independent reading. Please find your book from the class library and get started.

STUDENT: (Spends a long time searching through the books without picking one) I'm still looking.

TUTOR: Hurry up and find your book.

STUDENT: They are like tiny kid books that they make us read. Skinny little books about that big.

TUTOR: Just pick one and get started reading.

STUDENT: (Refuses to read) I'm not reading these. Dang, this class makes me feel stupid. It makes me a little mad n stupid to b in this class right now!
